regulations.title: Regulations
regulations.description: Overview of European Union UAV regulatory bodies and their responsibilities.

entries.topic: EU market access / declaration of conformity / CE marking
entries.source_title: Articles.pdf links: CE marking, declaration of conformity, and conformity-assessment guidance
entries.brief_summary: Bundle links for manufacturer-side market access and conformity documentation in the EU.

entries.source_title: Articles.pdf note: EU Regulations 2019/945 / 2019/947 and follow-on rulings
entries.brief_summary: Bundle notes summarizing the EU legal foundation for manufacturer and operator regulation, including initial airworthiness, third-country operators, and standard scenarios.

entries.source_title: Articles.pdf link: EASA open-category low-risk civil drones
entries.brief_summary: Explains the EU open-category operating rules for low-risk civil drones.

entries.topic: EASA FAQ / consolidated explanation of UAS rules
entries.source_title: Articles.pdf link: EASA FAQ — Regulations UAS / drone explained
entries.brief_summary: FAQ-style explanation of how the EU drone rules work in practice.

testing.title: Testing
testing.description: Overview of European Union UAV testing requirements and procedures.

entries.topic: RED RF standards stack for common short-range and broadband wireless devices
entries.source_title: Introduction to Wireless RF: an ETC Provided PDF, Page 6
entries.brief_summary: ETC RF deck maps the EU RED standards stack, including ETSI EN 300 220, EN 300 330, EN 300 440, EN 300 328, EN 301 893, EN 302 502, EN 301 357, and ERC Recommendation 70-03 for short-range, wideband, and 5 GHz systems.

entries.topic: Bluetooth modulation modes and channel plans used in RF evaluation
entries.source_title: Introduction to Wireless RF: an ETC Provided PDF, Page 6
entries.brief_summary: ETC RF deck summarizes Bluetooth modulation modes relevant to RF evaluation: Bluetooth 2.1+EDR uses GFSK, pi/4-DQPSK, and 8-DPSK, while Bluetooth LE uses GFSK; the deck also shows BR/EDR and LE channel-list examples and 20 dB emission-bandwidth examples.

entries.topic: Drone RF / EMC / LVD test stack for CE entry
entries.source_title: FCC/CE Testing and Certification for Drones - Compliance Testing
entries.brief_summary: Commercial explainer describing CE testing for drones as a stack combining RED for wireless communication, EMC for electromagnetic compatibility, and LVD for battery/power safety, with RF testing across controllers, video, telemetry, GPS, and other links.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: Overview of European Union certifications and compliance pathways for UAVs.

export-controls.title: Export Controls
export-controls.description: Overview of European Union market-entry, import, and export considerations for UAVs.
